productDisplayName: Nike Men Football Soccer Navy Blue Jackets
description: CompositionNavy blue jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock collar with a full front zipper, full sleeves with elasticated cuffs and hem, white piping and blue panels running from the shoulders to the cuffs, embroidered nike swoosh logo on the right chest, and has zippered pockets on the waistFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach, use softeners or allow to lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowRemove immediately Cool ironEnjoy the winter in style with hot street food or a heated game of soccer with this jacket from nike. Crafted from polyester fabric, this jacket is designed to keep you warm. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts.
